title: Getting troubles with receiving notifications on "due date"
excerpt: Hi! I’m getting troubles with receiving notifications on “due date”. I’ve created a task, added date+time and configured automation to be “When Date arrives, notify Eugene Beliaev”. But when the time passed, I didn’t get…

posts.author: eugenebeliaev (Евгений Беляев)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! I’m getting troubles with receiving notifications on “due date”. I’ve created a task, added date+time and configured automation to be “When Date arrives, notify Eugene Beliaev”. But when the time passed, I didn’t get neither Push, nor email. How can I make it work?

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml: I the trigger of the notification is date based. It doesn’t ‘listen’ to time I believe.
